sourceMovie.title: Cadaver
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Cadaver works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The drama and horror blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Bird Box
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Cadaver clicked for you, Bird Box (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and horror, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Cadaver?
faq.answer: Try Bird Box, Cargo, The Shining—each shares DNA with Cadaver while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Cadaver?
faq.answer: Cadaver (2020) is best described as Drama, Horror, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Cadaver worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
